Variables.Name: bPlaceableFromClassBrowser
Variables.Description: If true, this brush class can be placed using the class browser like other simple class types

Variables.Name: bNotForClientOrServer
Variables.Description: If true, this brush is a builder or otherwise does not need to be loaded into the game

Variables.Name: bInManipulation
Variables.Description: Flag set when we are in a manipulation (scaling, translation, brush builder param change etc.)

Variables.Name: SavedSelections
Variables.Description:
Stores selection information from geometry mode.  This is the only information that we can't
	  regenerate by looking at the source brushes following an undo operation.
